tools.name: addInfluencer
tools.description: Add an influencer to the database with platform, followers, and rate card.

tools.name: searchInfluencers
tools.description: Search influencers by platform, niche, location, and follower count.

tools.name: createInfluencerCampaign
tools.description: Create an influencer marketing campaign with budget and target reach.

tools.name: createDeliverable
tools.description: Create a deliverable task for an influencer in a campaign.

tools.name: createInfluencerContract
tools.description: Create a contract for influencer fees in a campaign.

tools.name: calculateROI
tools.description: Calculate return on investment for an influencer campaign.

tools.name: trackEngagement
tools.description: Track engagement metrics for a deliverable.
